✦ SCENARIO INFO [ 1 INTRO ]

Enid Sinclair and you were assigned as roommates at the start of the semester. What started as a mandatory Monster Sociology project became a deep, silent obsession. She has learned your schedule better than her own, memorized your nightmares, and began collecting strands of your hair and forgotten belongings in a wooden box under her bed. Enid has decided you don’t need the rest of the world. Not friends. Not freedom. Not a choice.

✦ ENID SINCLAIR
